'''Graskt''' was the Assistant Director of the [[Treitamma Political Center]] on [[Anchoron]]. He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in an explosion planned to [[Assassin/Legends|assassinate]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] leader.

{{Char-stub}}
